raw_source.title: [Remote/On-site] Clique is looking for Smart Contract Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About
We are hiring a senior smart contract engineer to develop on-chain identity system infrastructures with us. This would include integrations with our partnering DeFi, GameFi, NFT projects, off-chain oracle sources, etc. 

## Responsibilities
- Write battle-tested and gas-optimized smart contracts
- Design robust testing pipelines that include unit tests, e2e tests, and stress tests
- Integrate with multiple decentralized identity systems and off-chain oracle solutions
- Integrate partner pipelines with our SDK & factory smart contracts

## Requirements
- 2-3+ years of experience with Solidity/Rust development
- Extensive experience in deploying dApps in EVM-compatible chains and interacting with various crypto primitives like DeFi and NFT contracts
- Strong understanding of the core foundations of EVM
- Strong security mindset & familiarity with different testing frameworks

## Nice to Haves

- Interests in exploring on-chain reputation, identity, and credential systems
- Understanding of important EIPs like EIP20, 121, 165, 721, 1155, 1238, 4973, etc.
- Understanding of cryptographic primitives like signatures, multi-party computation, homomorphic encryption, zero-knowledge proofs, etc.

## Job Nature

- Full-time 
- Remote/ On-site if you are based in SG

## Salary and Benefits
65k USD~ 110k USD

##About Us:
Clique is building identity oracles that connect web2 user behavior data with web3 applications. We leverage advanced cryptographic technologies like ZKP, TEE, and MPC to develop modular solutions with customizable privacy assumptions. Our main products are designed to help protocols, creators, and brands identify high-value users/fans, perform Sybil-resistant checks, and distribute incentives accordingly. We already have 100+ partners across major L1/L2s, exchanges, marketplaces, NFT/GameFi/SocialFi projects, etc.

We were previously incubated by Alliance DAO and Stanford Blockchain Accelerator and raised millions in funding from renowned VCs like GGV, Qiming, Infinity Ventures Crypto, SevenX, Mirana, etc. Our team has a strong technical background and comes from prestigious institutions like Duke, Cambridge, NUS, Tsinghua, Citi bank, Brevan Howard, etc. Our advisors include top cryptography researchers, past founders of established media companies, as well as famous Hollywood directors and writers.

Check our website at [https://clique.social/](https://clique.social/) and our Twitter at [https://twitter.com/Clique2046](https://twitter.com/Clique2046).

## Contact
hiring@2046inc.xyz
